src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/StackA.general_idea: Update LiquibaseProperties import to match Spring Boot 4 package structure.
Replace external JHipsterConstants with local StackAppConstants for profile checks.

src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/aop/lo.general_idea: Replace the JHipster-specific constant for the development profile with a local application constant to decouple from the JHipster library.
Remove the import statement for the JHipster configuration class since its constants are no longer used in this file.
Add the import statement for the local application constants class to support the new constant usage.

src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.general_idea: Add Lombok @Getter and @Setter annotations to the main class and inner static classes to replace manual getter/setter generation.
src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.human_impl: @Getter @Setter public class ApplicationProperties { ... public static class Liquibase { ... } }

src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.general_idea: Introduce a nested Liquibase configuration class with an asyncStart property to manage Liquibase startup behavior.
src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.human_impl: private final Liquibase liquibase = new Liquibase(); public static class Liquibase { private Boolean asyncStart = true; }

src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.general_idea: Introduce a nested Logging configuration class to centralize log file path, size, and history settings.
src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.human_impl: private final Logging logging = new Logging(); public static class Logging { private String filePath; ... }

src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.general_idea: Introduce a nested File configuration class to manage file storage type, upload directories, and public/private path mappings.
src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.human_impl: private final File file = new File(); public static class File { private FileStorageType storageType = FileStorageType.LOCAL; ... }

src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.general_idea: Import the FileStorageType enumeration to support type-safe configuration of the file storage backend.
Update Spring Boot auto-configuration imports to match Spring Boot 4 package structure.
Update Hibernate auto-configuration imports to match Spring Boot 4 package structure.
Extract RedissonClient into a dedicated bean to ensure single instance reuse and fix configuration issues.
Inject the extracted RedissonClient bean into the JCache configuration method.
src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.human_impl: public javax.cache.configuration.Configuration<Object, Object> jcacheConfiguration(RedissonClient redissonClient, JHipsterProperties props)

src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.general_idea: Remove inline Redisson configuration logic from JCache bean in favor of the extracted RedissonClient bean.
src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.human_impl: Removed Config config = new Config(); ... clusterServersConfig ... singleServerConfig ...

src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.general_idea: Remove unused fields and imports related to Git and Build properties that are no longer used in this class.
src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.human_impl: Removed private GitProperties gitProperties; private BuildProperties buildProperties;

src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.general_idea: Remove unused imports for KeyGenerator and PrefixedKeyGenerator.
Remove unused import for Autowired annotation.
Remove unused import for ContextConfiguration annotation.
Add detailed JavaDoc comments explaining the cache configuration strategy, TTL settings, and known issues.
Reorganize imports to group standard library, third-party, and project-specific imports logically.
src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.human_impl: Moved javax.cache and java.util imports to the end of the import block.

src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.general_idea: Add static imports for cache names from various service classes to improve readability.
Replace explicit type declaration with 'var' for local variable type inference.
Replace javax.annotation with jakarta.annotation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3/4.
Add @Configuration and @Profile annotations to properly register the class as a Spring bean conditional on the 'data' profile.
Introduce SLF4J logger instance for debug output within the configuration class.
Define a @PostConstruct method to handle initialization logic, currently serving as a placeholder for Liquibase-managed data.
Remove manual registration of JavaTimeModule, Jdk8Module, and Hibernate6Module beans to rely on Spring Boot 4's auto-configuration for Jackson 3.
src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.human_impl: Deleted @Bean methods for JavaTimeModule, Jdk8Module, and Hibernate6Module and added a comment explaining the switch to auto-configuration.

src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.general_idea: Replace JHipster framework constant with a local application constant to decouple from the external library.
Remove the import statement for the JHipster constants class that is no longer used in the file.
Add import for the local constants class to support the new profile definition.
Replaced JHipster-specific profile constant with a project-specific constant to decouple from JHipster defaults.
Added JWT Bearer authentication scheme to OpenAPI components for API documentation.
Defined RFC7807 Problem response schema in OpenAPI components to document error responses.
Applied the defined bearerAuth security requirement to all API operations in the documentation.
Populated OpenAPI info section with title, description, version, contact, and license details.
Added descriptive tags for User Management and Auth API groups in the documentation.
Update Spring Security configuration to use method references and remove deprecated MvcRequestMatcher dependency.
Inject and use custom authentication entry point and access denied handler instead of default OAuth2 handlers.
Integrate ApplicationProperties to define dynamic security rules for public and private file storage paths.
Replace MvcRequestMatcher patterns with standard string patterns for static resources and Swagger UI.
Allow unauthenticated access to files stored in the configured public file path.
Explicitly deny all access to files stored in the configured private file path.
Define specific security rules for file upload/download APIs, allowing public GETs but requiring auth for POSTs and admin for DELETEs.
Allow unauthenticated access to Email OTP authentication endpoints.
Allow unauthenticated access to general authentication endpoints like login and registration.
Disable JWT token transmission via URI query parameters to prevent exposure in logs and browser history.

Comment out the @Profile annotation to disable production-specific static resource configuration, likely to allow static resources to be served in all profiles or due to a change in how profiles are managed in the new Spring Boot version.
Remove the import for JHipsterConstants as it is no longer used after commenting out the @Profile annotation.
Remove the import for Profile annotation as it is no longer used.
